calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2005 Off Calendar

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-29-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quieting Title of Real Propery Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Gordon Yamamoto, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bernadette Borja Sy, Trustee of the Engracia Escobar Borja Qualified Personal Residence Trust, and Mario A. Borja Qualified Personal Residence Trust, appearance waived.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Engracia Escobar Borja ind. and as the personal representative of the Estate of Mario A. Borja.
See description of the subject property in scanned doc.
Judgment signed in open court.

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Continued To Sep-29-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up/Quiet Title Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: June Leathley.
Gordon Yamamoto, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bernadetter Borja Sy Trustee of The Engracia Escobar Borja, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, Judgment is granted, pending Dismissal of the filing of the Dismissal, the Court continued this matter to 9-29-05 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for Plaintiff to file the dismissal as to Defendant: Estate of Mario A. Borja and All Persons.
Appearance waived.
